title: goodenia stelligera
intro: Goodenia stelligera, also known as the yellow flower or sticky goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Goodenia stelligera include its ability to reduce fever, relieve congestion, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
